Chloro Shield 20

Chlorpyriphos 20% EC

EC Formulation · Broad-spectrum insecticide · Trusted field performance

Chloro Shield 20 is Harishree Crop Science's field-ready Chlorpyriphos 20% EC solution for practical pest control programmes. Built for real farm conditions, it supports reliable action across common pest pressure windows when dose and timing are disciplined.

Dose: 50 ml/pump EC (Emulsifiable) formulation Contact + stomach + fumigant support Brand product: Chloro Shield 20

Pack sizes

Prices are included in structured data only, as requested. Contact us for current dealer availability.

500 ml

Professional crop protection support

Enquire now

1 Ltr

Professional crop protection support

Enquire now

Recommended dose: 50 ml per pump (follow crop label and local advisory).

Key benefits

Why growers choose Chloro Shield 20 for dependable Chlorpyriphos 20% EC performance.

Reliable broad-spectrum control in one bottle

Chloro Shield 20 supports practical management of common field pests where growers need contact, stomach and fumigant support in one programme.

Strong fit for integrated farm operations

The EC formulation mixes smoothly for routine knapsack spray schedules and helps teams maintain consistent field discipline.

Proven chemistry for tough pressure windows

Chlorpyriphos 20% EC remains a trusted option where early intervention is needed to contain damaging pest populations.

Simple on-field dose guidance

A practical recommendation of 50 ml per pump helps avoid under-dosing and keeps application planning straightforward.

Supports cleaner canopy and soil-zone protection

Designed for both foliar and soil-directed use patterns as per crop need, label direction and local advisory.

Compatible with disciplined rotation plans

Best performance comes when used with threshold-based scouting, proper intervals and mode-of-action rotation.

Target pests

Focus on early action and threshold-based decisions for stronger and cleaner field control.

Termites

Useful in programmes where termite pressure weakens root zone and early crop establishment.

Stem borers

Supports intervention during early borer activity to reduce internal feeding damage.

Leaf eating caterpillars

Helps reduce foliage loss when chewing pests start spreading across the canopy.

Cutworms

Can be used in field schedules where cutworm attack threatens stand uniformity.

Aphids and jassids

Useful as a broad-spectrum support product in mixed sucking pest situations.

Soil and surface insects

Flexible use options help growers manage both above-ground and near-root pest pressure.

Crops & applications

Practical crop-side use guidance for Chloro Shield 20.

  • Cotton

    Applied in pest windows where chewing and sucking complexes begin to build, with focus on timely first spray.

  • Paddy

    Used in practical field schedules based on scouting and infestation stage.

  • Sugarcane

    Supports programmes targeting borer and soil-side insect concerns in major cane belts.

  • Groundnut and pulses

    Can be included where mixed pest pressure affects canopy health and stand vigor.

  • Vegetable crops

    Useful in managed rotation plans for vegetables when pest pressure crosses threshold levels.

  • ETL-based recommendations

    Apply only as per scouting, local advisory and approved crop label instructions.

Technical specifications

Official reference details for Chlorpyriphos 20% EC and Chloro Shield 20.

Product information

Product name:Chloro Shield 20
Technical name:Chlorpyrifos
Active ingredient:Chlorpyriphos 20% EC
Concentration:20%
Form:EC (Emulsifiable Concentrate)
CAS number:2921-88-2
Physical state:Liquid
Brand (reference):Balaji

Dose & commercial references

Recommended dose:50 ml/pump
Application method:Foliar spray or crop-stage based directed application
Pack sizes in schema:500 ml, 1 Ltr
Main list price (schema only):INR 250 all taxes
500 ml price (schema only):INR 177 with GST
1 Ltr price (schema only):INR 330 with GST
Pesticide class:Organophosphate insecticide
Country of origin:Made in India

Mode of action

How Chlorpyriphos 20% EC performs when applied with proper dose and coverage.

  1. 1

    Contact action on exposed insects

    When spray droplets reach pests directly, Chlorpyriphos 20% EC acts on their nervous system and interrupts normal movement and feeding.

  2. 2

    Stomach action during feeding

    Pests ingesting treated plant surfaces are affected through stomach activity, helping reduce continued crop damage.

  3. 3

    Fumigant support in dense zones

    In practical field conditions, fumigant characteristics can support action in concealed pest zones when used correctly.

  4. 4

    Early timing improves field outcomes

    Apply at threshold stage, not after heavy infestation. Timely use gives cleaner control and lowers repeat spray pressure.

Usage & safety guidelines

Clear operational guidance for better on-field performance and safer handling.

Spray discipline PPE and stewardship

Usage best practices

Measure right, mix clean, spray with coverage.

  • 1

    Use complete PPE before opening pack

    Wear gloves, mask, eye protection and full sleeves while measuring and spraying.

  • 2

    Measure exact dose and pre-mix first

    Measure 50 ml per pump and pre-mix in a small amount of clean water before tank filling.

  • 3

    Maintain nozzle calibration and spray reach

    Spray in calm weather and ensure coverage across canopy and pest-prone zones.

Safety and responsibility

Follow label, local advisory and disposal rules.

  • 4

    Avoid drift near water and livestock areas

    Do not spray near ponds, fish culture points or grazing channels. Follow local buffer guidance.

  • 5

    Respect re-entry and hygiene protocols

    Allow safe re-entry period and wash exposed skin/clothing immediately after application.

  • 6

    Rotate chemistry in seasonal programme

    Do not over-repeat one chemistry. Use rotation with other groups as advised by agronomy experts.

Results & performance

Typical field outcomes when Chlorpyriphos 20% EC is used with correct dose and timing.

Consistent knockdown in practical farm settings

Growers use Chloro Shield 20 where dependable broad-spectrum action is needed under active pest pressure.

Field-friendly EC formulation

The liquid EC format supports easy measuring, pre-mixing and knapsack tank preparation.

Dose clarity for spray teams

A clear 50 ml/pump recommendation improves consistency across labor-managed spray rounds.

Useful across diverse crop systems

Works in integrated schedules for cotton, paddy, sugarcane and selected vegetable programmes.

Frequently asked questions

Common grower questions on Chloro Shield 20 and Chlorpyriphos 20% EC.

Chloro Shield 20 is a broad-spectrum insecticide used in field programmes for termites, borers, caterpillars and mixed pest pressure as per crop label and advisory.

Practical guidance is 50 ml per pump. Always confirm final dose with crop label instructions and local agronomy recommendation.

Yes, it is commonly used in integrated programmes for crops such as cotton, paddy, sugarcane and other label crops based on pest threshold.

Use PPE, measure dose accurately, pre-mix in water first, then fill the tank with agitation. Avoid drift and spray during calm conditions.

Yes. For better long-term performance, use Chlorpyriphos 20% EC in mode-of-action rotation and avoid repeated back-to-back use.

You can check our official technical reference section on this page and cross-check with our official IndiaMART listing for listing-level details.

What growers say

Feedback from farmers using Chloro Shield 20 in practical field programmes.

We used Chloro Shield 20 right at early infestation stage. The spray gave cleaner control and helped us stabilize the crop quickly.

The 50 ml per pump guidance is simple for our field team. Mixing is easy and results are reliable when timing is right.

We included Chlorpyriphos 20% EC in a rotation schedule and saw better control consistency across repeated scouting cycles.
